## Boundary Check

- [ ] Does not patch OpenCode core
- [ ] Does not write real `~/.config/mms/**`
- [ ] Does not write global `~/.config/opencode/**`
- [ ] Does not let adapters directly read/write canonical state
- [ ] Does not bypass `state-core` done-gate
- [ ] Does not treat experimental OpenCode surfaces as stable contract truth without evidence
